heading: Definition
label: 220701 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22070136:1813., , .Nov. 20, 1981Pub. L. 97–83, § 1495 Stat. 1096The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
